Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Counterpetition To Vacate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jeremy Kamras, Esq., of ARNOLD & PORTER KAYE SCHOLER LLP., Tel:415.471.3100 for petitioner
Andrew S. MacKay, Esq., of DONAHUE FITZGERALD LLP. Tel:510-451-3300 for Respondents
Court Reporter: Kenneth Brill CSR# 12797, Tel: 866-299-5127, Email: Ktmb165@gmail.com

Hearing held: A timely Notice of Contest was received from respondent's counsel regarding entirety of the tentative ruling. The matter argued/discussed. The Court reviewed the pleadings and heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioners' petition to confirm the arbitration award is GRANTED and Respondents' counterpetition to vacate the award is taken under submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Macadangdang, Court Reporter: Kenneth Brill CSR# 12797, Tel: 866-299-5127, Email: Ktmb165@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Respondents Eileen Gordon, Solo Io, Llc, And Gruppo Chiarello Incs Response To Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Counterpetition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Respondents Eileen Gordon, Solo IO, LLC and Gruppo Chiarello, Inc.'s unopposed Motion To Seal Portions Of Respondents Eileen Gordon, Solo IO, LLC, And Gruppo Chiarello Inc.'s Response To Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Counterpetition To Vacate Arbitration Award is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Respondents must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
